channel.title: Dimension 20 Live
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 Live on Dropout.tv

item.title: Dimension 20 Live: 2025 Battle at the Bowl
item.description:
The Bad Kids battle their greatest enemy in a fatal face off... it's the Rumble in the Chungle!

Duration: 1:56:49

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, Fantasy High, dungeons and dragons, fantasy, magic, wizards, high school, heroes, supernatural, tabletop rpg, pirates, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Dimension 20 Live: Battle at the Bowl Trailer
item.description:
Get ready for the final showdown between the Bad Kids and their greatest enemy. New special premieres November 12th.

Duration: 01:06

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, Fantasy High, dungeons and dragons, fantasy, magic, wizards, high school, heroes, supernatural, tabletop rpg, pirates, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
